blended.narrative: Nub's Nob is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 17 ft. Looking ahead, 42 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
